svg.title: voxelDVC icon (tensile)
svg.desc: Two voxelated cube volumes built from the same consistent 3D grid: a reference volume f(x) on the left with uniformly zero distortion (shown in blue), and a tensile-necked, deformed volume g(x+u) on the right that elongates axially while its cross-section contracts at mid-length, the opposite of an earlier compressive-bulge version. Voxel faces are colored on a blue to green to red colormap according to the local lateral (necking) displacement magnitude, red indicating the most distortion at the neck. An arrow labeled u(x) connects the two, and a color legend at the bottom reads low to high distortion.
